subject: Enable build warp speed
commit_message:
Enable build warp speed

This is just a test to see if we can reach the speed of light

Issue-ID: SDC-3467
Signed-off-by: ChrisC <christophe.closset@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I85118d3ce4d3148f25aeede0f8ea9d777c6df28d
